Hitting cues

Quick weekend notes

Start your highest-confidence contact hitters near the top.
Warm next pitcher once current arm hits orange zone.
Give confidence kids early glove wins and simple offensive goals.
Track just enough during games to make better next-inning decisions.

Suggested plan

Coach notes

Keep lines moving. At 9U, standing around kills focus.
Build confidence before correction. One small win changes a kid fast.
Use one cue at a time. Example: “Balance first.”
End with competition or live reps so practice feels fun.

Import GameChanger CSV

Upload a GameChanger CSV export. The app will try to match players by name and update ratings and stats.
Expected columns can include names like: Player, Name, AVG, OBP, SLG, Hits, RBI, Runs, SB, Innings, ERA, Strikeouts, Walks.
